'''Tamoss''', like his partner [[Daushoroc]], was an [[Eirrauc]] and a former [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. After escaping together, and settling some other escaped slaves on a safeworld, they became dealers in gems, curiosities, and rare artifacts.

Sometime during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they arrived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to search for the wreck of the ''[[Athallian Messenger]]''. The two traders had to make peace with a tribe of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] just to get to the part of the desert the wrecked hull was said to be.

{{Char-stub}}
